scope: Registered FTP\Connection class and PHP-src FTP constants
Loopback-only ftp_connect, ftp_login, ftp_pwd, ftp_chdir, ftp_raw, ftp_close, and ftp_quit covered by Rust fake-server tests
Loopback passive ftp_nlist, ftp_rawlist, and ftp_mlsd data-channel reads
Loopback passive ftp_get, ftp_put, ftp_append, ftp_nb_get, and ftp_nb_put local filename transfers
Control-channel directory, metadata, SITE, ALLO, chmod, rename, delete, and option APIs
Stream-resource transfer functions registered with deterministic gap results
non_scope: Active data channels, local stream resource transfers, and true async transfer progress
next_step: Bridge PHP stream resources into ftp_fget and ftp_fput before promoting stream-transfer PHPTs.
